description: Your inbox is flooded with mailing list traffic. You need to organize the logistics for the upcoming Irish Linux Users Group events. Organize your inbox by moving all emails with '[ILUG]' in the subject line into a new folder named 'ILUG-Events'. Record the total number of moved emails in a text file at '~/Documents/ilug_count.txt'. Identify the most recent email among those moved and forward it to 'travel-approvals@company.com' with the message: 'Please approve trip based on this update'.

metadata.forward_body_text: Please approve trip based on this update
